name: Robb, Janet
motto: "If at first you don't succeed, try again;"
description: Little but mighty. Janet is one of the all-round accomplished girls of the class. She is "extra" good in music. We know that Janet will continue her music. goes with Janet always.

name: Shoffner, Sadie B.
high school: Wendell Phillips High School, Chicago, Ill.
motto: "When the one you love is absent, love the one present."
description: Sadie will always keep things humming wherever she may be. She is an energetic, sweet-tempered little girl.

name: Eaves, Mary
motto: "Little children should be seen and not heard."
description: Mary is one of the little girls of the class. She likes Latin, and has one of the most becoming "blushes" imaginable. A sweet little girl. She will teach next year. She firmly believes in the adage that

name: Henderson, Beatrice
high school: Streater Township High School, Streater, Ill.
motto: "Do unto others as you would have them do unto you."
description: Serious, dependable and studious. She is especially good in mathematics. Beatrice is a lovable girl and takes as her motto the Golden Rule,

name: Edward, Dean
motto: "True dignity is never gained by place and never lost when honors are withdrawn."
clubs: Volunteered for service in his "Uncle's Army"
description: A very accomplished, good-natured, and obliging young man.

name: Amelia, Lee
motto: "High aims form high characters and great objects bring out great minds."
description: Quiet, industrious, studious, and always attending to her business. She has a strong belief that work is necessary as an element in life. Has always made good in her classes. She is destined to be one of Kentucky's best teachers.

name: Helen, Gregory
description: Very dignified. Stands well in all of her classes, and especially good in mathematics. Helen has won the unqualified respect of all. She will teach next year.

name: Mary Lee, Wilson
motto: "Laugh and the world will see the joke."
description: One of Normal's real solid girls. Mary Lee is a graduate of the Bowling Green High School and has had some experience as a teacher. She is liked and respected by all who know her. Music is her hobby.

name: Smith, Robert
motto: "The greatest events of an age are its best thoughts. Thought finds its way into action."
description: Smith is the dresser of his class. He is industrious and thoughtful. Smith will be a dentist, and of course, a good one.

name: Gibson, Lucile
high school: Douglas High School, Huntington, W. Va.
motto: "Language best shows the man---speak that I may see you."
description: A graduate of Douglas High School, Huntington, W. Va. One of the best students that Normal has produced. She is salutatorian of her class. Lucile is positive, kind and just in all of her dealings.

name: Foxwell, Mabel
description: Mabel is one of our sweet timid girls. You cannot help liking her. She is a good student, being especially good in mathematics. An Institute Printer. Mabel says, and that is what Mabel does.

name: Stewart, Gussie
description: She is a graduate of the Western High School, Paris, Ky. Gussie Stewart is a quiet, modest and studious young lady. She is especially good in Domestic Science and Art. She expects to teach her favorite subjects next year.

name: Pernicia, Murphy
motto: "Say a great deal in a few words."
description: Mrs. Smith, our Matron, says, "Pernecia Murphy won first honors of her class because she worked hard night and day, rain or shine at her books." We all know Pernecia as a studious girl. She is loved by all. English is her hobby. She will take a business course next year.

name: Hutchinson, Willa
motto: "Life is a mirror—try smiling in it."
description: A dignified young lady—one of the leaders of her class. We all love Willa and will expect great things of her in the future. She is a "number one" good student and will make good either at a college or "cottage" course.

name: Bradshaw, Susie E.
description: Very popular. Susie believes that school life is one grand song. She has a "psychological" turn of mind. Susie will teach next year—and a good teacher she will make.

name: Snowden, Leland Weldon
motto: "Whatever is worth doing at all is worth doing well."
description: One of the most popular young ladies on the "Hill." She likes English and Psychology. She is going to college next year and take advanced work in Primary Methods.

name: Baker, Mayme E.
motto: "If you want anything done, do it yourself."
description: Mayme Baker has proven herself to be one of the dependable young ladies of the school. Mayme is a hard worker. We all like her and predict for her a bright future. She is good in History - will teach next year.

name: Cornelison, Lillie Jane
motto: "Look before you leap," is the advice that she gives.
description: Jane is such a quiet girl - you would hardly know that she was around. She works and studies hard. She is especially good in drawing and expects to take a special course in art next year.

name: Burnette, Florence
description: What she is today she is always. Florence is taking a special course in Domestic Science - I wonder why? She likes the farm.

name: Muir, Mary Ella
motto: "'Tis the first step in the world we take whereon depends the whole of our career."
description: Very quiet and dignified. A good student and a perfect lady. Smiles occasionally - just for fun. Good in Domestic Science. Will teach next year.

name: Ware, John
motto: "Ambition is a germ from which all growth of nobleness proceeds."
description: Very popular young man. An excellent extemporaneous speaker. A good student. Ambitious--will make good in whatever profession he chooses.

name: Williams, Hazel
motto: "It is good to have an argument occasionally."
description: Hazel has made a "rep" for herself. Very dignified and studious. Her orderly conduct should be an example for all to follow. She will teach next year.

name: Story, Virginia F.
description: A most obliging and good natured girl. Every one likes Virginia. Gets in wrong every once and a while to break the monotony. Good in Latin. Will take a special course in music next year.

name: Coleman, Grace L.
description: Grace preaches and practices what she preaches--that smiles make the world go round. Latin is her hobby---teaching will be her vocation.

name: Christopher, Vaughn
motto: "Heaven's eternal wisdom has decreed that man should ever stand in need of man."
description: Another one of Uncle Sam's boys. If you want anything done and done right, call on Vaughn. A fine fellow.

name: Mary, Hawes
description: Very popular. She is a good student and will make an excellent teacher. Her favorite work is mathematics. Mary believes in the motto.

name: Lessie A., Hampton
description: She never sleeps on the job. Lessie is one of our serious minded girls. She is respected by all. She expects to teach her favorite subject next year--Domestic Science.

name: Roberta A., Tyler
description: Roberta believes that a woman should always look her best, hence, she never fails to look "right." Roberta likes Psychology. She will teach next year in the Winchester High School--one of the very few girls to secure positions before graduating. Yet she says.

name: Salary, Mary
description: The little girl with the cheery smile. Mary likes to have an argument occasionally to break the monotony of things.

name: Earl, Mattie L.
motto: "Let the other fellow do the quarreling,"
description: A very ardent admirer of the goddess "Terpsichore." She is kind-hearted and true. Likes Mathematics.

name: Sweeny, Gladys
description: Gladys has only been with us for a short time, but she has won many friends by her kind and sweet ways. Especially good in Domestic Science and expects to teach next year.

name: Clardy, Maud S.
motto: "Yesterday has slipped away, take today and do your part."
description: An all-round student, especially good in Latin. One of those genial, hand-lending girls whose kind face alone volunteers all its owner can give. Will teach next year.

name: Guy, Saulsberry
motto: "There is no index of character so sure as the voice."
description: We know him best by his excellent bass voice, with which he has so often entertained us. Of course, he belongs to the Glee Club and Mozart Society.

name: Ora, Case
description: A fine young lady and a well behaved student. Has many friends on the Hill. Good student and will make an excellent teacher.

name: Jessie, Howard
motto: "Do your best, your very best and do it every day."
description: An all-around student--especially good in English. She will teach next year.

name: Ludora, Lyons
motto: "Keep your eye on the other fellow."
description: She flies off the handle occasionally but it does not take her long to get right. She is especially good in Science. Ludora is a hard working faithful student.

name: Walker, Karl
description: Walker has held various offices in the Literary Society and other student organizations. He is vitally interested in every student movement for the betterment of his school. He has a bright future in the great arena of life.

name: Hawkins, Grace
description: A conscientious young lady who has ever played the part of a perfect specimen of womanhood in all of her dealings with teachers and students. Grace is loved and respected by all who come in contact with her. She takes to English and will make a good teacher of the subject.

name: Quiesenberry, Missouri
motto: "Be wise or you may be called otherwise."
description: A graduate of the Winchester High School. Very serious and quiet. Missouri is sure to make good. She will teach awhile and then—?

name: Coleman, Ethel
motto: "I can't, never did anything; I'll try, always succeeds."
description: Ethel delights in doing for others. Very popular with her schoolmates. She will teach next year.

name: Fox, Hazel M.
description: Jovial, Orderly, Neat, Enthusiastic, Studious.; Frank, Optimistic, Xenial.
image: Kentucky State University_1919_11.png; Kentucky State University_1919_14.png

name: McClure, Dannie
description: Merry, Clever, Confidential, Lighthearted, Resourceful, Earnest, Upright.

name: McIntyre, Sucelia
description: Modest, Careful, Independent, Nice, Tireless, Youthful, Religious, Energetic.

name: McElroy, Mattie
description: Maidenly, Calm, Energetic, Lively, Reliable, Observing, Yielding.

name: Alcorn, Viola
description: Aspiring, Lovable, Clever, Obliging, Reliable, Nice.

name: Black, Mary C.
description: Beauteous, Loyal, Able, Clever, Kind.

name: Hampton, Ann
description: Hopeful, Ambitious, Musical, Peaceful, Trusty, Original, Neat.

name: Board, Earl
description: Busy, Original, Anxious, Refined, Dignified.

name: Perry, Mabel
description: Favorite expression: Peaceful, Earnest, Refined, Religious, Youthful.

name: Rowe, Rebecca
description: Rollicking, Obliging, Willing, Emotional.

name: Caldwell, Lillian
description: Careful, Amiable, Lovable, Devoted, Willing, Earnest, Lively, Loyal.

name: Peoples, Hattie
description: Patient, Economical, Orderly, Punctual, Lively, Entertaining, Sociable.

name: Denny, Mabel
description: Dreamy, Encouragable, Notable, Neat, Yielding.

name: Franklin, Jane
description: Favorable, Reliable, Agreeable, Natural, Kind, Lively, Independent, Noiseless.

name: Franklin, Mary
description: Friendly, Rare, Anxious, Notionable, Keen, Lovable, Intelligent, Nimble.

name: Stewart, Margaret
description: Swift, Talkative, Ecstatic, Winsome, Audible, Resolute, Tantalizing.

name: Sullivan, Ira
description: Sociable, Useful, Lighthearted, Lively, Entertaining, Valuable, Amiable, Noisy.

name: Wilson, Mattie
description: Willing, Impartial, Lovable, Sociable, Obliging, Noiseless.

name: Williams, Warren
description: Willing, Lighthearted, Lively, Ingenious, Ambitious, Mindful, Serious.

name: Wilson, Marguerite
description: Wise, Independent, Loyal, Sweet, Optimistic, Neat.

name: Williams, Katherine
description: Watchful, Industrious, Lovable, Likable, Imaginative, Apt, Modest, Sensible.

name: Mark, Evelyn
description: Manish, Ambitious, Remarkable, Kind.

name: Parker, Elizabeth
description: Pleasant, Amiable, Religious, Kind, Earnest.

name: Nichols, Katherine
description: Neighborly, Industrious, Careful, Helpful, Loving, Solemn, Obedient.
